message:
test(pipeline): add explicit RetryDelay to retry-policy tests to prevent slow execution

The workflow retry policy tests (TestExecuteStep_UsesWorkflowRetryPolicy
and TestExecuteParallel_UsesWorkflowRetryPolicyForSubsteps) specified
RetryCount: 2 but did not set RetryDelay, which defaults to the
production retry backoff. Add RetryDelay: 1ms so these tests complete
in milliseconds instead of waiting through real backoff intervals,
improving test suite wall-clock time without changing test semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
